base_read.sql: SELECT p.person_number AS PNUM, TO_CHAR(MAX(pb.per_bnfts_bal_id)) AS PBID, TO_CHAR(MAX(pb.val)) AS VAL FROM ben_per_bnfts_bal_f pb JOIN per_all_people_f p ON p.person_id = pb.person_id AND SYSDATE BETWEEN p.effective_start_date AND p.effective_end_date WHERE pb.bnfts_bal_id = 300000074351542 AND pb.val IN (${PREFIX}1, ${PREFIX}2) AND p.person_number IN ('6','8','9') GROUP BY p.person_number
